system.description: You are a member of a Fencing School, an academy where young men learn the art of the sword. There are several benefits (and obligations) to membership. Members may master a Maneuver for 4 Advancement Points (instead of 5). They may also begin learning a new Dueling Style (assuming it is taught by the school) by paying only 7 Advancement Points (instead of 10) for the new Boon. Aside from dues, the greatest obligation of membership is protecting and defending the honor of the school. It is not uncommon for Fencing Schools to be involved in rivalries that turn into duels. Whenever the school gives you a task to perform, or causes you to be involved in a duel, you gain 1 Fortune Point. You may also ask your fellow students for aid, to serve as seconds, etc.
